title: About | Andy MacNae MP
meta_description: Find out more about my work, campaigns and how to help make our local area better for everyone.
text_excerpt: About | Andy MacNae MP >>>>>>>>> (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) >>>>>>>>> End (Gropup 1 - Necessary Cookies) Find me on Facebook 01254 476410 / 01706 489387 Email Me HOME ABOUT NEWS CAMPAIGNS LINKS CONTACT ABOUT Find out more about my work, campaigns and how to help make Rossendale and Darwen better for everyone. ABOUT ME My name is Andy MacNae and I am your Member of Parliament for Rossendale and Darwen. I was elected in 2024 as a Labour Party candidate. I live in Rossendale with my wife and son. Before being elected as your MP, I combined running my adventure sports business with being a local councillor. I have led on local regeneration initiatives including Rawtenstall Town Square, Lee Quarry Mountain Bike Trails, PEER (helping local businesses start and grow) and Bacup Townscape Heritage Initiative. I am a former full-time mountaineer, and I still climb today. Mountain climbing sparked my interest in public service, and I went on to become the national officer and deputy chief executive at the British Mountaineering Council. Another interest of mine is cycling, I ride regularly and want to see more people getting the opportunity to cycle safely, which is why I became a trustee of Cycling UK and in parliament I am treasurer of the All Party Parliamentary Group for Cycling. My objective as an MP is to be an effective champion for Rossendale and Darwen and to deliver on the things that matter to residents. MY PRIORITIES My top priorities as MP for Rossendale and Darwen are: Transport I want to see our communities better connected, with a commuter rail link from Rawtenstall to Manchester, more regular and reliable buses and quicker, safer journeys on the road, free from endless road works. Education Improving access to Special Educational Needs and Disabilities Provision is key to ensuring every child in the constituency is provided with suitable education. Underperforming schools must be improved and apprentices should be available for those who could benefit from them. Healthcare In spite of NHS staff’s best efforts, waiting times are simply too long. I’m pushing for the long-term reforms to the service that we need to turn this situation around, in our local hospitals, GP surgeries and dentists. Crime I’m working alongside local police forces, the Police and Crime Commissioner, and the government to tackle crime and anti-social behaviour across the constituency. Devolution Lancashire is missing out on the incredible opportunities a Manchester-style devolution deal provides. I’m working for Lancashire to have its own Mayor, who would turbo-charge the renewal of our county. Active Lifestyles When we exercise more, we are both happier and healthier. I’m pushing for more accessible, high quality sports facilities in our area, and I’m working on a national level for us all to have improved access to nature. Energy On a national and global level, we must address the threat of climate change through the provision of clean energy. Locally I want to ensure that houses have sufficient insulation and I will be supporting the development of Great British Energy. GET IN TOUCH As your local MP, I can help you with, or offer advice on, issues such as; benefits, immigration, tax, the NHS, child maintenance and education. I would love to hear from you about what you think my priorities should be as your MP and what matters most to you. Please use the contact form to get in touch with me. Please remember to provide as many details as possible, including your name, address and full details of your issue. 01254 47641
